title: Xüsusi Rabitə və İnformasiya Təhlükəsizliyi Dövlət Xidməti (State Service for Special Communication and Information Security)
description: National state service responsible for cybersecurity and the parent body of CERT.GOV.AZ. Cybersecurity overview page; no explicit post-quantum/PQC mention.

title: Kriptoqrafiya — Xüsusi Rabitə və İnformasiya Təhlükəsizliyi Dövlət Xidməti (Cryptography page, State Service for Special Communication and Information Security)
description: Official cryptography services page of the State Service. Verified via WebFetch: covers cryptographic protection and confidentiality services; does NOT mention post-quantum, quantum-safe, PQC, or quantum-resistant migration. Copyright 2026.

title: Kompüter insidentlərinə qarşı mübarizə mərkəzi (CERT.GOV.AZ — Computer Incident Response Center)
description: Azerbaijan national government CERT, under the State Service for Special Communication and Information Security. No explicit PQC advisory or guidance located.

title: MİLLİ KİBERTƏHLÜKƏSİZLİK MƏRKƏZİ — requirements page (National Cyber Security Center)
description: Azerbaijan National Cyber Security Center security-requirements page. Borderline: a search snippet referenced 'NIST-approved post-quantum end-to-end encryption' in a tooling/communications context. Could NOT be verified — site returns a TLS certificate error on WebFetch. Apparent passing mention, not a PQC policy/guidance/standard document.

title: The Strategy of the Republic of Azerbaijan on Information Security and Cybersecurity for 2023–2027
description: National cybersecurity strategy approved by Presidential Decree (Aug 2023). No explicit post-quantum/PQC reference found; record hosted on a third-party (Digital Watch) site, not an official AZ government domain.

title: Azərbaycan Standartlaşdırma İnstitutu (AZSTAND — Azerbaijan Standardization Institute)
description: National standards body (ISO member). No adopted national post-quantum/quantum-resistant cryptography standard located.

title: Ministry of Digital Development and Transport — Azerbaijan Cybersecurity Center project
description: Ministry handling digital policy. Cybersecurity center project page; no explicit post-quantum/PQC content located.

title: Müasir Kriptoqrafik Alqoritmlər və Gələcək Texnologiyalar (Modern Cryptographic Algorithms and Future Technologies)
description: Azerbaijani-language academic paper discussing post-quantum cryptography (Kyber, Dilithium). Academic/research source — not institutional/government; excluded.

title: İnformasiya təhlükəsizliyinin multidissiplinar problemləri üzrə konfrans (ICT.az conference proceedings)
description: Conference paper touching on quantum/post-quantum cryptography hosted on ICT.az (Institute of Information Technology, academic). Academic — excluded.
